# 3) Read image build history from config JSON

tar -xOf dockREleakage.tar.gz "$CFG" | jq '.history[].created_by'

# 4) Extract/check final flag fragment in top filesystem layer(s)
# (example: iterate layers and grep for flag-like text/files)
for L in $(tar -xOf dockREleakage.tar.gz manifest.json | jq -r '.[0].Layers[]'); do
